description: You need to extend the site's functionality by registering a custom post type directly in code and then publishing a new project. Register a new Custom Post Type in the active child theme's functions.php file (/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/themes/agency-child/functions.php) with the key portfolio, labels 'Portfolio Projects' (plural) and 'Portfolio Project' (singular), public set to true, has_archive set to true, show_in_rest set to true, and supports including 'title', 'editor', 'thumbnail', and 'excerpt'. Do not use any plugins for this registration. Publish a new 'Portfolio Project' titled 'NASA Graphics Standards Manual Restoration' with the excerpt 'A comprehensive restoration of the 1975 NASA Graphics Standards Manual.' and content from ~/Documents/Portfolio_Assets/project_description.txt. Set ~/Documents/Portfolio_Assets/featured_image.png as the featured image.

metadata.expected_excerpt: A comprehensive restoration of the 1975 NASA Graphics Standards Manual.
